title: OPC CONNECTION
body: How Ignition talks to PLCs. AB → Logix Driver. Modbus, Siemens, others have their own drivers.
code:
Allen-Bradley Logix:
  Name:      PLC1
  Hostname:  10.16.18.224
  Port:      44818
  ConnPath:  1,0   (backplane, slot)
  Scan:      Default (1000ms)

Modbus TCP:
  Hostname:  192.168.1.100
  Port:      502
  Unit ID:   1

Siemens S7: OPC-UA or 3rd-party module
mistakes: Wrong connection path (1,0 vs 1,2) — check RSLinx
Not checking device status after creating
